v2_sources.title: Zolbetuximab plus mFOLFOX6 in patients with CLDN18.2-positive, HER2-negative, untreated, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (SPOTLIGHT): a multicentre, randomised, double-blind, phase 3 trial
v2_sources.citation: Zolbetuximab plus mFOLFOX6 in patients with CLDN18.2-positive, HER2-negative, untreated, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (SPOTLIGHT): a multicentre, randomised, double-blind, phase 3 trial. The Lancet. 2023.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: CLDN18.2-positive, HER2-negative, untreated, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma patients

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Zolbetuximab treatment showed a significant reduction in the risk of disease progression or death compared with placebo (HR 0.75, 95% CI 0.60-0.94; p=0.0066). The median progression-free

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'The 12-month progression-free survival was 49% (95% CI 42-55) in the zolbetuximab group versus 35% (28-42) in the placebo group, and the 24-month progression-free survival was 24% (17-32)

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'The 12-month overall survival was 68% (95% CI 61-73) in the zolbetuximab group versus 60% (54-66) in the placebo group.', 'page': 6}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'This is the first phase 3 study to show a survival improvement after CLDN18.2-targeted therapy in any tumour type.', 'page': 8}
